title: decision record — extracted header of records/decisions/ADR-NNNN.md
description: ADRs stay markdown (templates/adr.md): rationale and rejected alternatives exist in no diff, and prose is their natural form. This schema binds the machine-read header lines ('Status:' / 'Date:' / 'Supersedes:' / 'Superseded-by:', extracted by src/records.mjs with statuses lowercased) — the fields CTX-02/CTX-03 already enforce semantically. V1 ADR homes (docs/decisions/, docs/adr/) remain valid via decision_globs; records/decisions/ is the V2 home.

status.description: Decision state (the adr-status check's accepted vocabulary, lowercased). Superseded/deprecated require a forward link — that stays CTX-02's job.

supersedes.description: The ADR this one reverses ('none' or 'ADR-NNNN').

superseded_by.description: The ADR that reversed this one ('none' or 'ADR-NNNN') — the forward link CTX-02 requires on superseded records.
